== Notes for [[Item:Q3674|Q3674]] ==

Philosopher

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADB88D8A1EFBBFA9822EF79916C253C
geni:6000000013586122511


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
== Merged content ==
== Notes for [[Item:Q2997|Q2997]] ==

Confidant to King Alfonso V and known as the "wise Jew" Flees Portugal to Italy in 1495, imprisoned and tortured for teaching Judaism to Marronos.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADAC48611EFBBFA9822EF79916C7ED9
geni:6000000013598149785


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
